title: SMC Trading Strategy
description: A TradingView strategy script built with Pine Script v5, implementing Smart Money Concepts including Order Blocks, FVGs, and Liquidity Sweeps.

title: Risk Management Tool
description: A full-stack risk calculator for prop firm traders. Features real-time market data, preset profiles for firms like FTMO & Maven, and dynamic position sizing.

title: Portfolio Website
description: A modern, responsive portfolio built with React and Vite, featuring glassmorphism design, scroll animations, and a premium dark theme with admin panel.

title: Hotel Management System
description: A comprehensive desktop application developed in Java for hotel employees. It streamlines operations by managing room bookings, guest check-ins, and daily administrative tasks efficiently on PC.
